productDisplayName: Puma Men Maroon Graphic Casual Shoes
description: puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalistic design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these puma shoes are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. They are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style.UpperCanvas upper with fabric overlays and a durable PU toe boxForm-stripe for absolute comfort and durabilityPU foxing for abrasion-free comfortLacing system for a customised FitMidsoleEVA midsole for comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with ergonomic grooves for absolute grip and traction
